titles.title: It Won’t Be Long Till Jesus Comes

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I believe it won't be long and He shall come He will come as a thief in the night, Tho the world will go on as before, But to the gentiles He'll close heaven’s door.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I’m so glad that I saw the light And thank God that I made things right; I believe it is any time my friend, Look at the world, it’s as dark as the night.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh my friends ask Jesus today, to wash your sins away He'll hear your humble heart’s cry Look in God’s word and you'll find Him there.
